svg.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; background: #FFFFFF;
svg.text: The AI Bidding War — System Architecture
orchestrator.py · Anthropic API · advisor (value, COI, risk) · governance nudge · skills/award_contract
appended each round · no cross-vendor data
JSON all vendors) + RFP + hard ceiling
IN scenario · RFP · award msg · stitched threads
OUT Markdown audit (compliance / value / risk / COI)
FAIL stub text → logged · flow continues to gatekeeper
Solid = runtime API call (orchestrator invokes audit, buyer, vendors via Anthropic API)
Dashed = governance / nudge loop (human no → orchestrator → buyer → re-audit)
Dotted = file writes / persisted artifacts (append-only during run; not read as cold-start inputs)
Strategic Audit (Zone 3) — in-run, per proposed award, governance & assurance
Hub state (Zone 2) — per-round state; vendors never see other vendors' bids
Zone 5 outputs — persisted after run; never loaded as orchestrator cold-start inputs
